mapper.select: SELECT equipment_log.equip_num, equipment_log.equip_status, equipment_log.error_sign, equipment_log.equip_action, equipment_log.maintenance_date, equipment_log.start_date, equipment_log.end_date, item.item_num, item.code, item.name, emp.emp_num, emp.ename FROM equipment_log JOIN item ON equipment_log.item_num = item.item_num JOIN emp ON equipment_log.emp_num = emp.emp_num ORDER BY equipment_log.maintenance_date DESC
